case_title: P W FU VS. ROSE GONZALES et al

docket_entries.description: TO DISMISS FRIVOLOUS PREFILING ORDER FOR UNSUBSTANTIATED ACCUSATION OF VEXATIOUS LITIGANT AND NONSENSICAL FEE WAIVER RECONSIDERATIONS IMMEDIATELY FILED BY PLAINTIFF FU, P W
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF FU, P W
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR HEARING ON COURT'S MOTION FOR PREFILING ORDER PREVENTING FILING BY VEXATIOUS LITIGANT HEARING SET FOR SEP-19-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF(S) REQUEST TO POSTPONE SEP-12-2012 SMALL CLAIMS HEARING

TRIAL MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-19-2012 IN 206, THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DECLARE PLAINTIFF P W FU A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT WAS HEARD. APPEARANCE BY SELF-REPRESENTED PLAINTIFF AND ATTORNEY KEVIN MACLAUGHLIN FOR DEFENDANT(S) IN VARIOUS CASES WHERE MS. FU IS THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE OF HEARING WAS DENIED. OBJECTION WAS NOTED. MOTION WAS ARGUED AND THE COURT ORDERED MS. FU DECLARED A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT PURSUANT TO CCP 391(B)(3). ANY NEW CLAIM FILED BY MS. FU IN THE FUTURE SHALL REQUIRE A PRE-FILING ORDER FROM THE PRESIDING JUDGE'S DEPARTMENT. PLAINTIFF STATED SEVERAL VARIATIONS OF HER NAME AS FOLLOWS: P.W. FU, PO WAN FU, BO WAN FU. THE COURT INSTRUCTED PLAINTIFF TO UPDATE THE COURT'S RECORD WITH HER MOST RECENT ADDRESS. THE COURT WILL PREPARE AND SERVE THE ORDER. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: J.I. ROQUE/D. LOK; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,846.60 FILED BY FU, P W AS TO DEFENDANT GOUZALES, ROSE TAM, EVE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-12-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR RECONSIDERATION OF FEE WAIVER APPLICATION HEARING SET FOR SEP-19-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
ORDER DECLARING BOWAN FU (AKA: PO WAN FU, P.W. FU AND PW FU) A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT
SC-105 REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT GOUZALES, ROSE TAM, EVE
ORDER SC-105 ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER-CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FU, P W ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-09-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GOUZALES, ROSE
NOTICE - COURT'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR PREFILING ORDER PREVENTING FILING BY VEXATIOUS LITIGANT

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-19-2012 IN 206, APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. APPLICANT'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE OF HEARING IS DENIED. OBJECTION IS NOTED. REHEARING ON P W FU'S APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF FEES AND COSTS IS HELD. THE RULING ON THE APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS REMAINS AS IS. NO FUTURE REQUESTS FOR FEE WAIVER SHALL BE GRANTED AT THE FILING COUNTER. ORDER SENT BY THE COURT. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: J.I. ROQUE/D. LOK; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
ORDER (AMENDED) ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER. THE CASE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $200.00 FILED BY FU, P W AS TO DEFENDANT GOUZALES, ROSE TAM, EVE JANE DOE DOE, JOY JANE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-31-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TAM, EVE
COPYING FEES (7 PAGE) SC-100 AND POS-10 BLANK FORMS. PAID BY PLAINTIFF FU, P W
RETURNED MAIL: REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF PO WAN FU.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-12-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
COPYING FEES (12 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF FU, P W
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF FU, P W
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-12-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO DEC-12-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED SEP-11-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOE, JOY JANE
ORDER ON COURT FEE WAIVER AFTER RECONSIDERATION HEARING
